Home / YouTube Video SEO Checklist

YouTube Video SEO Checklist

Complete SEO checklist to maximize rankings before publishing.

How to Use This Tool

1
Review the checklist.
2
Check off items as you complete them.
3
Use before every upload for consistent SEO.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I really need to do all these steps?

Each item improves a different SEO factor. Skipping steps reduces your chances of ranking. The checklist ensures consistency.

How often should I use this checklist?

Before every upload. Make it part of your publishing workflow.

Results

Data updated on May 31, 2026

Copy All
#1 Checklist ready! Check these items before publishing: ☐ Keyword in title (first 60 characters) ☐ Compelling thumbnail with 3 words or less ☐ Description has 200+ words with keywords ☐ 10-15 relevant tags added ☐ Hashtags in description (3 max) ☐ Chapters/timestamps added ☐ End screen and cards set up ☐ Captions/subtitles uploaded ☐ Playlist added ☐ Pinned comment with CTA ☐ Custom thumbnail uploaded (not auto-generated) ☐ Video file named with keyword (before upload)
AdSense — tool result
